Price negotiation, price problems tend to go away. The kind of prospect you attract tends to be a higher level of prospect. So all of the very expensive condominium buildings in New York City, 900 square foot apartments being sold for $15 million. You can't just walk in there and buy it if you've got $15 million and everybody knows it. You have to get through the board of other residents and the people who are managing the building and so forth. And you have to qualify in order to be allowed to buy that and allowed to move into that building. Well, that process alone, the real estate agent now representing this doesn't really have a price conversation. They have a, I need to help you get accepted. Let's work together to build your case. I'm not sure I can get you in. And the more of that occurs, the more the person wants to be in. So now it doesn't have grand of countertops. That window is this much smaller. When you're selling a $200,000 house to John and Mary, you've got all that crap. The real estate agent has to deal with it all. The window faces in the wrong direction, the bathroom is too small. This stuff's out the window. I bought in. Right. And can you get me in? So when you create that and people greatly underestimate how it can be created and the kinds of businesses it can be created in. When you create that, it's not that you negate selling. You just get to sell at a much higher level with a lot more price the last day. And a lot less stress for everybody. Yeah, that's exactly what I keep going back to when I was selling over the telephone. Literally one call, $20,000 closes. And that's exactly the whole thing is they were trying to sell themselves on me. I structured it like I was a got the rinker and people were coming to pitch me their ideas. Now they had to give me money, but it just changed the whole dynamic and it makes selling so easy. I am placed here. There's one in Virginia too, but the one here where we board the million dollar dog. In order to be allowed to open the play time during the day with the other dogs, the dog has to take an assessment. A psychological test to see whether or not it's okay to put the dog in there. So the conversation about how much does it cost to put the dog here for a day? It is immediately switched. I watched him do it. Well, it depends. And one of the things it depends on is we have to put your dog through this assessment to determine whether or not it can have group play. It's compatible. Right. Okay. How does that work? Right. We're now not talking about. Right. Now you're hoping your dog qualifies. Right. So do we have to do it right now? I take the dog home, give it a quail and just bring it back. You know, bring it back tomorrow. I'm immediately trying to think about how to cheat this process because I know this is not going to be easy. The dog flunked it by the way. But so if you can do it in a dog kennel, this is my point. Right. So if you can do it in a dog kennel, you can do this just about anywhere, if you will. Absolutely. I think two points on it. One is its deal flow, making sure you have enough deal flow so that you feel comfortable to do it. That's right. And two is it's a state of mind because it's not for the faint of heart. No. Because, you know, the mediocre salesperson wants to pounce on an elite. It's never I'm going to take that away from them. But yeah, absolutely. If you could do it for a dog kennel, you could do it for anything under the sun. Love takeaway selling. You've got to figure out a way to incorporate it into your business. I mean, it does change a whole bunch. It makes a bunch of those objections that we talk about go away. I can give this to you in an incredibly competitive environment. You wouldn't think that you could do it. Let's do it. So in my infancy as a toddler, you know, many people know I was in the amway business. And at the time, sort of one of the stars, the rising, a name in northeast Ohio, at least everybody knew. His name was Kenny McAfee and he was the first diamond level distributor in Amway. And so he had a story. Right? And so, but anybody can sign up in Amway. I think the kit was 25 bucks, I think at the time. And you're in. Right? And it's universal. It's the same for everybody.
